Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1A00 "ITSAKNOCKOUT-1000-1A00" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "It's a Knockout.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $1000 to setup port A ($DD00) and it's data direction register ($DD02) as per the init code found at $014D in the original loader.
